metadata.title: PerPix — Digital Products That Make Impact
metadata.description: PerPix is a senior-only digital product studio. No templates, no junior teams — just custom-built products with an AI-first approach and a proven delivery record.

items.title: Product Design
items.description: UX Research, UI Design, Design Systems

items.title: Software Development
items.description: Full Stack, Mobile, Web Applications

items.title: AI Integration
items.description: LLM Integration, Intelligent Automation

items.title: Growth Strategy
items.description: Data Analysis, Conversion Optimization

hero.subtitle: No templates. No junior teams. Just senior experts, an AI-first approach, and a proven delivery record — assembled with precision.

impact.label: Our Philosophy
impact.subtitle: Every line of code, every pixel, every design decision — built from scratch, for your business.

differentiators.label: Why PerPix
differentiators.subtitle: Four pillars that make working with us a fundamentally different experience.

items.title: 100% Custom Build
items.description: Every project is designed and developed from scratch. No templates, no shortcuts, no copies — just a product built precisely for your business.

items.title: AI-First Methodology
items.description: From research to final delivery, AI is integrated at every step of our process to multiply speed, quality, and precision.

items.title: No Junior Assignments
items.description: Every PerPix team member has 8+ years of hands-on experience. You get seasoned judgment, not a learning curve from a junior team.

items.title: Today's Tech Stack
items.description: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node — we work with tools that are maintainable, scalable, and future-ready.

process.label: Process
process.subtitle: Four structured phases for delivering every project on time, within budget, and beyond expectations.

items.quote: PerPix delivered our banking platform in 14 weeks — on time, on budget, and beyond our expectations. The senior team made all the difference.

items.quote: Finally, an agency that doesn't assign juniors to your project. Every interaction was with someone who actually knew what they were doing.

items.quote: From research to launch, the process was transparent and structured. We always knew exactly where the project stood.

metadata.title: Our Process
metadata.description: How PerPix works — a structured six-step process from discovery to launch, with full transparency and senior expertise at every stage.

hero.subtitle: A proven, transparent process that takes your product from first conversation to production launch — with a senior team guiding every step.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We start by deeply understanding your business, users, and market. Through workshops, interviews, and competitive analysis, we uncover the insights that shape every decision ahead.

steps.title: Strategy & Planning
steps.description: With clarity from discovery, we define the product roadmap, set measurable KPIs, and create a detailed project plan with timelines, milestones, and risk mitigation.

steps.title: Design & Prototyping
steps.description: Our designers craft wireframes, interactive prototypes, and high-fidelity UI — validated with real users before development begins.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Senior engineers build your product in agile two-week sprints with clean, maintainable code, automated testing, and regular demos.

steps.title: Testing & QA
steps.description: Comprehensive testing across devices, browsers, and use cases. We catch bugs, validate usability, and ensure performance before launch.

steps.title: Delivery & Growth
steps.description: We deploy to production, set up monitoring, and provide 30-day post-launch support — plus ongoing optimization to drive growth.

items.title: Design-Driven Focus
items.description: Every decision starts with the user. Design thinking guides our process from day one.

items.title: Client Transparency
items.description: Weekly updates, shared dashboards, and open communication at every stage.

items.title: Results-Oriented
items.description: We measure success by your business outcomes, not hours billed.

items.title: Full-Stack Expertise
items.description: Design, frontend, backend, and DevOps — one senior team, end to end.

cta.subtitle: First step is just one conversation. No commitment, no sales pitch — just honest discussion about your project.
